practices.name: Box Breathing (4-4-4-4)
practices.description: Navy SEAL technique. Inhale 4s, hold 4s, exhale 4s, hold 4s. Repeat. Activates parasympathetic nervous system.
practices.bestTime: Pre-workout, before sleep, or during stress

practices.name: Wim Hof Breathing
practices.description: 30 deep breaths, hold on empty, recovery breath. 3 rounds. Boosts adrenaline, reduces inflammation.
steps: On last exhale, hold breath as long as possible
This is 1 round — do 3 rounds total

practices.name: Body Scan Meditation
practices.description: Progressive awareness from toes to head. Notice tension without judgment. Release on exhale.
steps: Slowly move attention up through each body part

practices.name: Visualization Training
practices.description: Mentally rehearse your workout before starting. See yourself completing each exercise with perfect form.
steps: Visualize walking to your training space
See yourself performing each exercise perfectly
Imagine completing the last rep strong

practices.name: Gratitude Journal
practices.description: Write 3 things you're grateful for. Include 1 body/health related item. Shifts focus from lack to abundance.
steps: Include 1 thing about your body or health
Write 1 thing you're looking forward to

practices.name: Cold Exposure Protocol
practices.description: End shower with cold water for 2-5 minutes. Start with 30 seconds and build up. Massive dopamine and norepinephrine boost.
steps: Start at 30 seconds, build to 2-5 minutes
Don't tense up — relax into it

practices.name: Focused Breathing Walk
practices.description: Walk at easy pace. Focus only on breath pattern: 4 steps inhale, 4 steps exhale. Moving meditation.
steps: Sync breath with steps: 4 steps in
If mind wanders, return to counting

practices.name: Sleep Optimization Protocol
practices.description: Sleep is when muscle grows and fat burns. 7-9 hours non-negotiable. Dark room, cool temperature, consistent schedule.
